channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3.4%.

item.title: LabourList: Which Labour MPs are calling for Starmer to go - and who is still backing PM?
item.description: Which Labour MPs are calling for Starmer to go - and who is still backing PM?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Reeves warns leadership challenge risks ‘chaos’ as Rayner cleared over tax affairs
item.description: Starmer latest: Reeves warns leadership challenge risks ‘chaos’ as Rayner cleared over tax affairs

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live
item.description: Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Rayner tax issues explained after HMRC clears leadership contender of wrongdoing
item.description: Rayner tax issues explained after HMRC clears leadership contender of wrongdoing

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why Rayner being cleared over her tax affairs is a problem for Streeting’s bid for No 10

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why the path to No 10 is not an easy one for any of Starmer’s would-be challengers
